productName: .5g Isolated Pre-Rolled Cones  - Isolated Crop CircleZ Pre-Rolled Cones -1
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps crop circleZ flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a balanced head-and-body experience. A little goes a long way.
